rule: Fan-facing communications must be calm, specific, multilingual when needed, and consistent across PA, signage, volunteers, and information desks.
Accessible entrances, restrooms, elevator banks, and pickup paths must remain open before nonessential crowd-flow optimizations.
Demo outputs may provide deterministic planning guidance but must not claim exact live crowd, transit, weather, or match-result data.
Medical access blockage, stopped crowd movement, or unsafe density requires immediate escalation to venue safety command.
